library.name: Basic Scene Grammar
library.description: Core scene-based grammar library for high-frequency structures, contrastive function words, and sentence frames.

items.title: because + clause
items.coreExplanation: 用 because + 从句 直接、明确说明原因。because 后面接完整从句（主语+谓语）。
items.usageNote: 口语和写作都常用；在句首时常用逗号隔开。

slotSchema.label: Reason clause
slotSchema.hint: 完整原因从句（主语+谓语），如: I was sick

slotSchema.label: Result clause
slotSchema.hint: 结果从句，可放在 because 从句前或后

commonErrors: 误用: because of + 从句（应改为 because + 从句）
because 从句不完整（缺主语或动词）
句首 because 从句后不加逗号，导致阅读不清

contrasts.title: because of + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: because of 后接名词/动名词短语；because 后接从句。

contrasts.title: since + clause (reason)
contrasts.note: since 更偏“既然/鉴于”，语气常更委婉或更理所当然。

contrasts.title: because of + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: since + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: as + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: I stayed home because I was sick.
examples.translation: 我待在家，因为我生病了。
examples.note: because 后接完整从句 I was sick。

examples.sentence: Because it was raining, we canceled the picnic.
examples.translation: 因为下雨了，我们取消了野餐。
examples.note: 句首 because 从句后常用逗号。

templates.label: Because-clause reason
templates.exampleSentence: I left early because I had a meeting.
templates.exampleTranslation: 我提前离开，因为我有个会议。

items.title: since + clause (reason)
items.coreExplanation: “since + clause”表示原因，语气常把原因当作双方已知/不需强调的背景信息，常放句首引出结论或安排。
items.usageNote: 用于“原因”时不要和“从……以来(时间)”混淆；写作中常见，语气较客观。

slotSchema.label: Reason clause
slotSchema.hint: 已知/背景原因（含主谓结构）

commonErrors: 把 since 当成时间：Since I was a kid...（若要表达原因需确保语境是“因为”而非“自从”）
直接用名词作从句：since the rain（应为 since it is raining / since it rained）
与 because 混用造成重复：because since...（二选一）

contrasts.title: because + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: as + clause (reason)
contrasts.note: as 与 since 都较弱化原因；as 更口语/书面都可，since 更常见于书面推理语境。

contrasts.title: as + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: Since you’ve already finished the report, let’s submit it today.
examples.translation: 既然你已经完成报告了，我们今天就提交吧。
examples.note: 原因当作双方已知的背景，用来引出决定。

examples.sentence: Since the roads are icy, we’ll take the train instead.
examples.translation: 由于路面结冰，我们改坐火车。

templates.label: Background reason → decision
slotHints: reason: 已发生/已知事实（完整从句）
templates.exampleSentence: Since it’s getting late, we should head home.
templates.exampleTranslation: 既然不早了，我们该回家了。

items.title: although + clause
items.coreExplanation: 用although引导让步从句，表示“虽然…但是…”。从句里要有完整主谓；主句表达实际结果或转折。常见结构：Although + 从句, 主句。
items.usageNote: 较偏书面与正式写作；口语中也能用，但不如even though强调。可放句首或句中（I…, although…）。避免与but重复。

slotSchema.label: although从句
slotSchema.hint: 写完整句子：主语+谓语（可含过去/现在/完成时）

slotSchema.label: 主句
slotSchema.hint: 表达与让步相对的结果/决定

commonErrors: although后接名词/动名词：Although the rain / Although raining（应改用despite/in spite of或补全从句）
把主句写成从句片段，缺少主语或谓语，导致不完整句

contrasts.title: even though + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: despite + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: despite后接名词/动名词短语；although后必须接完整从句。

contrasts.title: despite + noun / v-ing
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: Although the data is limited, the results are consistent.
examples.translation: 虽然数据有限，但结果是一致的。

examples.sentence: I went for a walk, although it was raining.
examples.translation: 虽然下着雨，我还是去散步了。
examples.note: although也可放句末，语气更自然。

templates.label: Basic (sentence-initial)
slotHints: 让步点/不利条件（完整从句）
实际结果/转折（完整从句）
templates.exampleSentence: Although I was tired, I finished the report.
templates.exampleTranslation: 虽然我很累，但我还是完成了报告。

items.title: if + present, will / can + base
items.coreExplanation: 用于真实、很可能发生的条件：If从句用一般现在时表达条件；主句用will/can+动词原形表达结果（将来/可能/能力）。
items.usageNote: If从句不要用will；也可把If从句放句末。

slotSchema.label: If-clause (present)
slotSchema.hint: 一般现在时：主语+动词原形/三单

commonErrors: If从句里误用will：If it will rain...
主句动词误用过去式：...will went / can went
条件与结果时态搭配混乱：If you will come, I can help

contrasts.title: unless + clause
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

contrasts.title: if + past, would + base
contrasts.note: 用于不真实/假设情况：If I had time, I would help.

contrasts.title: if + past, would + base
contrasts.note: Easily confused with this pattern; compare scenario and slot usage carefully.

examples.sentence: If it rains tomorrow, we’ll stay home.
examples.translation: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家。
examples.note: If从句用一般现在时表达将来条件。

examples.sentence: If you finish early, you can leave first.
examples.translation: 如果你提前做完，你可以先走。

templates.label: Basic
slotHints: result：will/can + 动词原形的结果句
templates.exampleSentence: If you need help, I can explain it again.
templates.exampleTranslation: 如果你需要帮助，我可以再解释一遍。
